title: ZickZack ORI Red 🌹
description: A Resourcepack that is similar to BastiGHG's Resourcepack used in Craft Attack 13. Custom Sky, Kugelschreiber Model, HUD and more included!
body:
# BastiGHG ORI Red

![Texturepack Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d36b0619cb366cf6fdc7bbbcaea60d3204329613.png)

This is a resourcepack that mimics the texturepack used by BastiGHG on the CraftAttack 13 server. The pack comes with custom skyboxes, updated hud & hotbar, Kugelschreiber Bow Model, red arrows and more!

### Contributors

- **@inowtp** was a huge help with the pack, he contributed the correct skyboxes for the pack and helped with further tweaks and enhancements, thanks a lot for helping me out!

### ORI Suitcase

If you want to get the mysterious suitcase in-game, please checkout the great project by **davidpel**: [https://modrinth.com/project/kH6OD1Z9](https://modrinth.com/project/kH6OD1Z9)

### ORI Kugelschreiber / Pen & Tracker

This texturepack includes the pen & tracker models, which show up when you rename a bow to either 'Kugelschreiber' or 'Pen' and a compass to 'Tracker'. There are further details in the gallery!

![Tracker and pen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60b713544133f9aadafb094a7a79692a80c4a6b1_0.webp)
![Rename compass or bow for custom models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/665e51431b0bd0d8373a998398f44d5127bfc875.png)

## Texture changes

- GUI hearts and armour are red
- Apples as food bar
- Optifine/Optiboxes Custom Sky (Red night sky, blue day sky (double sun & artifacts fixed)
- Arrows are Red
- Added alternative model (Kugelschreiber/pen) for the bow
- Added alternative model (Tracker) for the compass

> **NOTE about the Tracker:** The Tracker may appear glitchy when moving, because animation frame time is reset when the compass changes direction, this is a limitation by minecraft which can (sadly) not be fixed.

> **NOTE about custom SkyBoxes:** You need to install a mod in order to make the custom skyboxes work, I recommend Optiboxes for this. If you are using Optifine or if you're playing on BadLion, the pack should just work fine!

___

### Resourcepack Support

For any questions or problems with the resource pack, please contact me on Discord!
**PLEASE** do not ask for support in the BastiGHG Discord or in his Twitch Chat!

[![Discord Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3665f56469b6ecf5227ef253d0c03368ec178baa.png)](https://discord.gg/CE3rzSnzzw)

___

## **DISCLAIMER:**

> I am not BastiGHG, this is a community made resourcepack! This resourcepack is not approved by or associated with BastiGHG in any way! Some textures are not available to me, so I can't include them!
